Requested test types: Functional / E2E, UI Testing User flow (design source of truth ‚Äî 2 screens). Each screen has a design image (attached, model can see it); the LIVE app is validated AGAINST each screen's design as you navigate. NONE of these images is the live app. 1. Screen "Home" ‚Äî reached by: Start page ‚Äî open the application URL. Design: docs/design/Screenshot_from_2026-07-13_12-14-01.png 2. Screen "Screen 2" ‚Äî reached by: click "learn more" link. Design: docs/design/Screenshot_from_2026-07-13_12-14-19.png Generate ONE Playwright flow that opens the start page, validates it against screen 1, then performs each navigation action and validates the resulting page against that screen's design. Deviations are defects. Do not pre-declare deviations before running. Task: Test the homepage against the attached design. --- Previous stage (Context Analyst) already ran; its summary/handoff: I'll start by reading the relevant files to understand the project structure and instructions. Good. I have all the context I need. Now I'll derive the design specs from the attached images and produce all Context Analyst artifacts. **Design Analysis from Attached Images:** **Screen 1 ‚Äî Home (`https://example.com/`)** - Background: `#eeeeee` (light grey) - No header, no logo, no nav bar, no footer - `

` text: `"Example Domain"` ‚Äî dark/charcoal text, bold, large - `

` text: `"This domain is for use in documentation examples without needing permission. Avoid use in operations."` - Blue hyperlink: `"Learn more"` (left-aligned, below paragraph) - No other elements visible **Screen 2 ‚Äî IANA page (reached by clicking "Learn more")** - White background body, light grey header/footer - IANA logo top-left + "Internet Assigned Numbers Authority" text - Top nav: `Domains`, `Protocols`, `Numbers`, `About` - `

` text: `"Example Domains"` - Body text includes RFC 2606 and RFC 6761 references (blue links) - `"Further Reading"` section heading - Bullet: `"IANA-managed Reserved Domains"` (blue link) - Footer: "Last revised 2017-05-13." - Footer columns: Domain Names, Number Resources, Protocols, About Us - Footer links: `"Privacy Policy"`, `"Terms of Service"` Now update `actualtestcases.csv` with the derived test cases and update `project-memory.md`: --- ## Context Analyst ‚Äî Stage Complete ‚úÖ Here is what was produced and what I observed from the design images. --- ### Design extraction (from attached images ‚Äî authoritative) **Screen 1 ‚Äî Home (`https://example.com/`)** | Element | Expected value (from design) | |---|---| | `
